title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: August 8, 2024
summary: August 8, 2024: The Arctic sea ice has continued to decrease this week and at a greater rate of 11.22% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 8.37%), from the level on 08/01/2024 of 6.241 M km 2 to 5.541 M km 2 for this week. For this time of year, we are now essentially tied at the 2nd lowest...
